channel.title: Information Nudge on Personal Website of Hiroki Kato
channel.description: Recent content in Information Nudge on Personal Website of Hiroki Kato

item.title: Exploring Information Provision to Promote Stem Cell Donation: Evidence from a Field Experiment of the Japan Marrow Donor Program
item.author: hkato.econ@cider.osaka-u.ac.jp (Hiroki Kato)
item.description: Journal of Economic Behavior and Organization, Just Accepted.

item.title: Adding Nudge-based Reminders to Financial Incentives for Promoting Antibody Testing and Vaccination to Prevent the Spread of Rubella
item.author: hkato.econ@cider.osaka-u.ac.jp (Hiroki Kato)
item.description: Journal of Behavioral and Experimental Economics, 2024. [Link (Open access)]
